title: Sur la route de papa
overview: Ready to go on vacation, Kamel finds himself forced to change his plans at the last minute and hit the road to Bled with his mother. Aboard the old Renault 21, Kamel and his family embark on a long journey to Morocco. On the road to his past, memories and resentments resurface, revealing the beauty of the bonds that unite them.
